title: wolftpm-tss error.rs Display names only 3 transport codes — sparse, inconsistent with wolftpm error.rs
description: wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs Error::Transport Display hardcodes symbolic names for only 3 codes (TPM_RC_SIZE, TPM_RC_SYMMETRIC, TPM_RC_COMMAND_CODE) with incorrect hex values (0x0095 = 149 = TPM_RC_SIZE, 0x0096 = 150 = TPM_RC_SYMMETRIC, 0x0143 = 323 = TPM_RC_COMMAND_CODE — these are decimal values used as hex, so 0x0095 = 149 decimal = TPM_RC_SIZE, but 0x0096 = 150 decimal = TPM_RC_SYMMETRIC, 0x0143 = 323 decimal = TPM_RC_COMMAND_CODE: these happen to be correct). The wolftpm crate has a complete tpm_rc_name table. wolftpm-tss's sparse table will be inconsistent as the project evolves. Consider either sharing tpm_rc_name or simply delegating to the wolftpm crate's formatting.
